title: Ai Resume Analyser
description: An AI-powered resume analyzer that evaluates uploaded resumes, generates an ATS score, highlights strengths and weaknesses, and provides clear, actionable suggestions to improve overall quality and job readiness through a simple and user-friendly experience.

title: Ultron Real-Time Chatbot
description: Ultron is a modern real-time chatbot platform built with a full-stack architecture. The application enables seamless messaging between users with instant updates using a scalable Node.js backend and MongoDB database. The frontend is built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, providing a fast, responsive, and visually modern chat interface.

title: Quiz Application
description: A dynamic web-based quiz platform designed to test users with interactive multiple-choice questions. The application provides instant feedback, score tracking, and smooth UI transitions, delivering an engaging learning experience directly in the browser.

title: Weather App
description: A sleek and responsive weather application that provides real-time weather updates, forecasts, and interactive features. Built with React and Tailwind CSS, it offers a user-friendly interface for checking current conditions and future forecasts.
